books.title: The Three Hostages
books.author: John Buchan
books.summary: A former man-of-adventure is coaxed out of comfortable retirement and into danger as he aids in the rescue of three hostages.

books.title: The Vicomte de Bragelonne
books.author: Alexandre Dumas
books.summary: The events of the early days of Louis XIV’s majority reign in France, including the continuing story of the four musketeers who served both Louis XIV’s father and himself.

books.title: “We”
books.author: Charles A. Lindbergh
books.summary: Legendary aviator Charles Lindbergh gives an account of his early life, how he got into flying, and his famous transatlantic flight.

books.title: A General History of the Pirates
books.author: Captain Charles Johnson
books.summary: The lives and stories of the daring pirate outlaws who terrorized the Atlantic Ocean and Caribbean Sea in the 18th century.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Beatrix Potter
books.summary: A collection of Beatrix Potter’s short stories for children, ordered by date of publication.

books.title: Misalliance
books.author: George Bernard Shaw
books.summary: On a pleasant summer afternoon, a sudden plane crash followed by a would-be assassin interrupt a family’s conversations about marriage.

books.title: All’s Well That Ends Well
books.author: William Shakespeare
books.summary: A woman tricks her husband into fulfilling his marriage demands.

books.title: The Shaving of Shagpat
books.author: George Meredith
books.summary: A Persian barber embarks on a quest to save a city from the clutches of a tyrant and his magical hair.

books.title: The Elusive Pimpernel
books.author: Baroness Orczy
books.summary: A French official schemes to finally catch the Scarlet Pimpernel.

books.title: John Silence Stories
books.author: Algernon Blackwood
books.summary: A physician turned detective uses his psychic abilities to solve the strange cases presented to him.

books.title: My Disillusionment in Russia
books.author: Emma Goldman
books.summary: Emma Goldman recounts her experiences living in the early Soviet Union.

books.title: The Sign of the Four
books.author: Arthur Conan Doyle
books.summary: An analytical detective is consulted by a young woman who has received a strange communication regarding her long-missing father and a mysterious treasure.

books.title: Essays
books.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson
books.summary: A collection of Ralph Waldo Emerson’s essays.

books.title: A Voice from the South
books.author: Anna Julia Cooper
books.summary: A Black woman from the American South philosophizes on various subjects.

books.title: Lyrical Ballads
books.author: William Wordsworth
books.summary: A collection of pastoral poems that is considered the defining text for the beginning of Romantic-era literature.

books.title: Crome Yellow
books.author: Aldous Huxley
books.summary: A young writer travels to an English countryside manor to spend the summer alongside a cast of outlandish leisure class intellectuals.

books.title: The Strange Case of Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde
books.author: Robert Louis Stevenson
books.summary: A London lawyer investigates the relationship between a brilliant scientist and a misshapen misanthrope.

books.title: The Wisdom of Father Brown
books.author: G. K. Chesterton
books.summary: Amateur detective and Catholic priest Father Brown solves mysteries in this second collection of Father Brown short stories.

books.title: Siddhartha
books.author: Hermann Hesse
books.summary: A man embarks on a spiritual journey through India.

books.title: Two Years Before the Mast
books.author: Richard Henry Dana Jr.
books.summary: A Harvard student embarks on a two-year voyage as a sailor aboard a merchant ship, exposing the harsh conditions of life at sea in the 19th century.
